title: Power to order peace bonds
doc_html:
CHAPTER 4.  PEACE BONDS

Art. 26.  Power to order peace bonds

A magistrate may order a peace bond in conformity with the provisions of this Chapter.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 4.  PEACE BONDS
Art. 26.  Power to order peace bonds
A magistrate may order a peace bond in conformity with the provisions of this Chapter.
